title: Caesar Trusts His Backers

dialogue.text: Give us back our smoke-yan!! Caesar!!

summary: Caesar Trusts His Backers. This part advances Punk Hazard’s rescue mission, Caesar’s experiment, and the fragile pirate–Marine alliance.
